metadata.title: XLSX World | Excel files made easy
metadata.description: Easily manipulate and edit Excel files with XLSX World. Our intuitive platform allows you to import, export, and transform spreadsheets with powerful tools designed for both beginners and professionals.

home.heading: Stop wrestling with Excel.
home.subheading: The Excel toolkit for accountants, analysts, and anyone who lives in spreadsheets.
home.trustLine: Free to use · No signup required · Uploads are never kept
home.guidesHeading: Fix common Excel problems in minutes
home.guidesBullet1: Fix broken formulas across entire workbooks
home.guidesBullet2: Clean messy CSV and XLSX exports
home.guideCard1Desc: Trace, diagnose, and resolve the most common formula errors in any workbook.
home.guideCard2Desc: Fix separators, encoding, and broken structure before analysis.
home.guideCard3Desc: Combine workbooks without copy-paste or losing headers.

faq.metaDescription: Find answers to common questions about XLSX World, our tools, file safety, and more.
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Find quick answers to common questions about our platform and tools.
faq.q1: Is my data safe? Do you store my files?
faq.a1: Your uploaded source files are never kept. They are processed in memory to produce your result and then deleted. If you are signed in, the output file is encrypted end-to-end and saved for 7 days so you can re-download it from your history — only you can decrypt it, and you can delete it at any time with one click. Anonymous users get a one-time download with nothing retained.
faq.q2: Can anyone else see my files?
faq.a2: No. Stored outputs are encrypted with a unique key before they leave the server. Even if someone gained access to our storage, the files would be unreadable without the encryption keys held separately. Only your authenticated session can trigger decryption.
faq.q3: Is it safe to upload confidential work files?
faq.a3: Your uploaded source files are never retained. For signed-in users the resulting output is encrypted end-to-end and stored for up to 7 days — it can be deleted instantly from your history. For highly sensitive files (legal, financial, medical) use your own judgment as you would with any online tool.
faq.q4: Do you share data with third parties?
faq.a4: No. We don't sell or share any data. Analytics we collect are anonymous usage metrics (which tools are used, how often) — never file contents.
faq.q5: Do I need an account to use the tools?
faq.a5: No. Every tool is free and works without an account. Signing up adds real benefits — a 7-day history with re-download of your outputs, and features we're building on top of it — without paywalling anything that is free today.
faq.a6: Most tools support .xlsx, .xls, .xlsb, and .xlsm files. Some tools also accept .csv, .json, .xml, .sql, and .pdf. Each tool page shows exactly which formats it accepts.
faq.q7: What is the maximum file size?
faq.a7: Without an account, each upload can be up to 10 MB. With a free account, each upload can be up to 25 MB. For larger files, split the workbook first using our Split Workbook tool, then process each part separately.
faq.q8: Why is my file taking long to process?
faq.a8: Processing time depends on file size and complexity. Most files complete in under 5 seconds. Very large files (10 MB+) or files with thousands of formulas may take up to 30 seconds. If it takes longer than a minute something may have gone wrong — try again.
faq.q9: My download didn't start. What do I do?
faq.a9: Check your browser's pop-up blocker — it may be blocking the download. Try allowing pop-ups for xlsx.world and try again. If the issue persists try a different browser.
faq.a10: All 32 tools are free to use with generous daily limits. We offer optional paid plans that increase usage limits and unlock premium features — but the core tools remain accessible to everyone.
faq.q11: What's the difference between Merge Sheets and Append Workbooks?
faq.a11: Merge Sheets combines multiple sheets from the same workbook into one sheet. Append Workbooks stacks rows from multiple separate workbook files into one output file.
faq.q12: Can I use these tools on my phone?
faq.a12: Yes. All tools are designed to work on mobile browsers. File upload and download work on both iOS and Android.
faq.q13: A tool returned an unexpected result. What should I do?
faq.a13: Try the tool again with a smaller test file first to isolate the issue. If the problem persists use the Contact page to report it — include the tool name and a description of what went wrong.
faq.q14: What happens to my account if I delete it?
faq.a14: Your account and profile data are permanently deleted, along with every tool-output file stored under your account. Uploaded source files are never retained in the first place, so there is nothing else to remove.
faq.q15: Can I use xlsxworld without creating an account?
faq.a15: Yes. Every tool works without an account. An account unlocks a 7-day history so you can re-download your past outputs from My Account → History; anonymous runs still work exactly as before, with nothing stored.
faq.q16: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
faq.a16: Click "Forgot password" on the login page and enter your email. You'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive.
faq.q17: How long are my output files kept?
faq.a17: For signed-in users, output files are encrypted end-to-end and stored for up to 7 days, then automatically hard-deleted. The history row stays visible marked as "Expired" after that. You can delete any entry yourself at any time from the History page.
faq.q18: Where can I re-download past results?
faq.a18: Sign in and open My Account → History. Each successful job has a Download button that decrypts and delivers your file directly. Anonymous runs are not stored, so save the file when you run the tool.
faq.stillHaveQuestionsDescription: If you couldn't find the answer you were looking for, our team is always happy to help.

error.detail: If this keeps happening, please tell us what you were doing so we can fix it.

privacy.metaDescription: Learn how XLSX World handles your data, files, and privacy.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.scopeText: This Privacy Policy explains how XLSX World collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information when you use our website, account features, and spreadsheet tools.
privacy.infoCollect1: Account data, such as email address and optional profile details.
privacy.infoCollect2: Support data you submit through the contact form.
privacy.infoCollect3: Operational metadata, including request timestamps, route usage, and basic diagnostic events.
privacy.infoCollect4: Security and abuse-prevention data, such as IP address and rate-limit signals.
privacy.infoCollect5: If you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address, and profile picture from your Google account. We do not receive or store your Google password.
privacy.fileProcessingText: Files you upload are processed temporarily on our servers solely to perform the requested operation (convert, merge, split, inspect, etc.). Your uploaded source files are never retained — they are deleted as soon as processing finishes. For authenticated users, the resulting output file is encrypted end-to-end with a unique per-file key before being stored for up to 7 days so you can re-download it from your history; after that it is automatically hard-deleted. You can delete any output earlier with one click from the History page. Anonymous users get a one-time direct download with nothing stored. We do not read, inspect, sell, or share the contents of your files. Per-file upload limits are currently 10 MB for anonymous use and 25 MB for signed-in free accounts.
privacy.howWeUse1: To provide and secure core product functionality.
privacy.howWeUse2: To authenticate sessions and maintain account access.
privacy.howWeUse3: To measure reliability and performance of endpoints and tools.
privacy.howWeUse4: To respond to support requests and enforce acceptable use.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies and secure session mechanisms required for authentication, request continuity, and abuse prevention. If you select 'Remember me' during login, your session persists across browser restarts; otherwise, session cookies expire when you close your browser. We do not use advertising cookies.
privacy.dataSharingText: We do not sell your personal data. We may share limited information with service providers that help us operate the platform (for example, hosting, authentication, and abuse protection), subject to appropriate contractual safeguards.
privacy.thirdPartyText: We use third-party services to deliver core product features, including CAPTCHA, hosting infrastructure, authentication, and Google Sign-In. When you sign in with Google, your authentication is handled by Google's OAuth 2.0 service and Supabase Auth. Please refer to <cloudflareLink>Cloudflare's Privacy Policy</cloudflareLink>, <googleLink>Google's Privacy Policy</googleLink>, and other provider terms for details on their data handling.
privacy.retentionText: We retain data only for as long as needed to provide the service, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. Uploaded source files are never retained. Authenticated tool outputs are encrypted end-to-end and kept for up to 7 days, then automatically hard-deleted; you can delete any output earlier from your history. Job history rows (metadata only — tool used, timestamps, success/failure) may be kept up to 90 days for analytics and then pruned.
privacy.rightsText: You may contact us at any time to request deletion of any personal data we may hold, subject to legal and security requirements. Use our <contactLink>contact form</contactLink> to submit privacy requests.
privacy.securityText: We apply technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect your information. All stored output files are encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM with unique per-file keys (envelope encryption). Encryption keys are stored separately from file data. No system is completely secure, and you are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using XLSX World tools and services.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By using XLSX World, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.serviceText: XLSX World provides online tools to convert, merge, split, inspect, clean, validate, and otherwise process spreadsheets and related files. Each tool lists the formats it supports; these commonly include Excel workbooks (.xlsx, .xls, .xlsb, and similar), CSV, and depending on the tool, JSON, XML, SQL, or PDF. Optional accounts add features such as job history and re-download of encrypted outputs. Paid plans with higher usage limits and premium features are available; core tools remain accessible on the free tier. We may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time.
terms.accounts1: You are responsible for activity performed under your account.
terms.accounts2: You must keep credentials confidential and use strong security practices.
terms.accounts3: We may suspend access to protect users, systems, or data integrity.
terms.accounts4: If you sign in with Google, your account may be automatically linked to an existing account with the same verified email address.
terms.acceptableUse1: Maximum file upload size: 10 MB per upload when you are not signed in, and 25 MB per upload when signed in to a free account.
terms.acceptableUse2: The service may only be used for lawful purposes.
terms.acceptableUse3: You must not upload content you are not authorized to process.
terms.acceptableUse4: You must not abuse, overload, reverse engineer, or disrupt the platform.
terms.acceptableUse5: Automated or abusive usage may result in rate limiting or access restrictions.
terms.acceptableUse6: Without an account you may run up to 20 tool jobs per UTC day; with a free account, up to 200 jobs per UTC day. These limits may change, and additional abuse-prevention measures may apply.
terms.yourFilesText: You retain full ownership of any files you upload. We do not claim any rights over your content. Your uploaded source files are never retained — they are deleted immediately after your task completes. For authenticated users, the resulting output is encrypted end-to-end with a unique per-file key and stored for up to 7 days so it can be re-downloaded from your history, after which it is automatically deleted. You can delete any stored output from your history at any time.
terms.ipText: The XLSX World service, branding, software, and site content are protected by intellectual property laws. Except as explicitly permitted, you may not copy, distribute, or create derivative works from our platform content.
terms.thirdPartyText: Some functionality relies on third-party providers. Their services may be governed by additional terms and privacy practices outside our control.
terms.disclaimerText: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that results will be accurate. Always keep backups of your original files.
terms.liabilityText: XLSX World shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the service, including but not limited to data loss or corruption.
terms.indemnificationText: You agree to defend and indemnify XLSX World from claims, liabilities, and expenses arising from your misuse of the service, violation of law, or infringement of third-party rights.
terms.terminationText: We may suspend or terminate access at our discretion, especially in cases of abuse, legal non-compliance, or security risk.
terms.contactText: Questions about these terms can be sent through our <contactLink>contact form</contactLink>.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

inspect-sheets.title: Inspect Sheets
inspect-sheets.heading: Inspect Sheets
inspect-sheets.description: Preview sheet structure with filters, sorting, and quick stats.
inspect-sheets.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file (.xlsx, .xls, or .xlsb) using the file picker or drag-and-drop.
inspect-sheets.seoHowItWorks2: The tool reads every sheet and displays row counts, column headers, data types, and quality stats.
inspect-sheets.seoHowItWorks3: Browse sheets, filter rows, sort columns, and spot issues before running other tools.
inspect-sheets.seoWhyUse: Quickly audit an unfamiliar spreadsheet before processing it. See blank rows, duplicate counts, and column types at a glance — no need to open Excel or install anything.
inspect-sheets.seoFaq1Q: What file formats can I inspect?
inspect-sheets.seoFaq1A: You can inspect .xlsx, .xls, and .xlsb files within your plan's per-file upload limit (10 MB without an account, 25 MB when signed in).
inspect-sheets.seoFaq2A: No. Inspection is read-only — your original file is never changed.
inspect-sheets.seoFaq3A: No. Password-protected workbooks must be unlocked before inspection.

merge-sheets.title: Merge Sheets
merge-sheets.heading: Merge Sheets
merge-sheets.description: Combine selected sheets into one using a shared header row.
merge-sheets.seoHowItWorks1: Upload an Excel workbook that contains the sheets you want to merge.
merge-sheets.seoHowItWorks2: Select which sheets to include and arrange their merge order.
merge-sheets.seoHowItWorks3: Click Merge to download a new workbook with all selected data in one sheet.
merge-sheets.seoWhyUse: When your data is split across tabs in the same workbook, merging them into one sheet makes analysis, pivot tables, and reporting much easier.
merge-sheets.seoFaq1Q: Do all sheets need the same columns?
merge-sheets.seoFaq1A: Ideally yes. The tool uses the first selected sheet's header as the shared header row.
merge-sheets.seoFaq2Q: Is there a limit on how many sheets I can merge?
merge-sheets.seoFaq2A: No hard limit on sheet count — you can merge all sheets as long as the workbook stays within the per-file upload limit (10 MB without an account, 25 MB when signed in).
merge-sheets.seoFaq3A: Data values are preserved. Formulas, styles, and advanced formatting are not carried over.

append-workbooks.title: Append Workbooks
append-workbooks.heading: Append Workbooks
append-workbooks.description: Combine rows from multiple workbooks into a single output sheet.
append-workbooks.seoHowItWorks1: Upload two or more Excel workbooks using the file picker.
append-workbooks.seoHowItWorks2: Arrange the file order and choose an output sheet name.
append-workbooks.seoHowItWorks3: Click Append to download a single workbook with all rows combined.
append-workbooks.seoWhyUse: Perfect for consolidating monthly reports, survey batches, or data exports from different systems into one unified spreadsheet.
append-workbooks.seoFaq1Q: Do the workbooks need identical columns?
append-workbooks.seoFaq1A: They should share the same column structure for best results. Mismatched columns may cause alignment issues.
append-workbooks.seoFaq2Q: How many files can I append at once?
append-workbooks.seoFaq2A: There is no fixed limit on file count, but each job must stay within the per-file upload limit (10 MB without an account, 25 MB when signed in), including total combined size.
append-workbooks.seoFaq3Q: Can I control which sheet is used from each workbook?
append-workbooks.seoFaq3A: The tool appends all source sheets. Use the merge tool first if you need to pick specific sheets.

split-sheet.title: Split Sheet
split-sheet.heading: Split Sheet
split-sheet.description: Split a sheet into chunks by row count with custom naming.
split-sheet.seoHowItWorks1: Upload an Excel file and select the sheet you want to split.
split-sheet.seoHowItWorks2: Set the number of rows per chunk and customize the output naming style.
split-sheet.seoHowItWorks3: Click Split to download a workbook with each chunk as a separate sheet.
split-sheet.seoWhyUse: Break oversized sheets into manageable pieces for import limits, email attachments, or batch processing without losing your header row.
split-sheet.seoFaq1Q: Is the header row included in every chunk?
split-sheet.seoFaq1A: Yes. The header row from the original sheet is automatically repeated in each output chunk.
split-sheet.seoFaq2Q: Can I split by a column value instead of row count?
split-sheet.seoFaq2A: Currently the tool splits by fixed row count only. Column-based splitting is planned.
split-sheet.seoFaq3A: You can use numeric (01, 02), alphabetic (A, B), or custom token sequences.

split-workbook.title: Split Workbook
split-workbook.heading: Split Workbook
split-workbook.description: Extract each sheet into its own XLSX file, bundled as a ZIP.
split-workbook.seoHowItWorks1: Upload an Excel workbook with multiple sheets.
split-workbook.seoHowItWorks2: Select which sheets to include in the output.
split-workbook.seoHowItWorks3: Click Split to download a ZIP file containing one XLSX per sheet.
split-workbook.seoWhyUse: Distribute individual sheets to different teams or systems that only accept single-sheet files, without manually saving each tab.
split-workbook.seoFaq1Q: Are sheet names preserved in the output files?
split-workbook.seoFaq1A: Yes. Each output file is named after its source sheet.
split-workbook.seoFaq2Q: Can I split only some sheets?
split-workbook.seoFaq2A: Yes. You can select exactly which sheets to include in the ZIP output.
split-workbook.seoFaq3A: You get a .zip archive containing one .xlsx file per selected sheet.

xlsx-to-csv.title: XLSX → CSV
xlsx-to-csv.heading: XLSX → CSV
xlsx-to-csv.description: Export one or more sheets as CSV files.
xlsx-to-csv.seoHowItWorks2: Select one sheet for a single CSV or multiple sheets for a ZIP of CSVs.
xlsx-to-csv.seoHowItWorks3: Click Download to get your CSV file instantly.
xlsx-to-csv.seoWhyUse: CSV is the universal data exchange format. Convert your Excel files to CSV for database imports, data pipelines, or any system that doesn't support XLSX.
xlsx-to-csv.seoFaq1Q: Can I convert all sheets at once?
xlsx-to-csv.seoFaq1A: Yes. Select multiple sheets and download them as a ZIP archive of CSV files.
xlsx-to-csv.seoFaq2A: CSV files are exported in UTF-8 encoding for maximum compatibility.
xlsx-to-csv.seoFaq3A: Only the computed values are exported. Formulas themselves are not included in CSV output.

csv-to-xlsx.title: CSV → XLSX
csv-to-xlsx.heading: CSV → XLSX
csv-to-xlsx.description: Turn a CSV file into a proper XLSX workbook.
csv-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your CSV file using the file picker or drag-and-drop.
csv-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks2: Set the delimiter (comma, semicolon, tab, or custom) and output sheet name.
csv-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks3: Click Convert to download your new XLSX workbook.
csv-to-xlsx.seoWhyUse: Turn plain CSV data into a proper Excel workbook for formatting, formulas, charts, and sharing with colleagues who prefer XLSX.
csv-to-xlsx.seoFaq1A: Comma, semicolon, tab, and custom single-character delimiters.
csv-to-xlsx.seoFaq2Q: Will my data types be preserved?
csv-to-xlsx.seoFaq2A: Yes. Numbers, dates, and text are detected and stored with appropriate Excel types.
csv-to-xlsx.seoFaq3A: The tool accepts files within the per-file upload limit (10 MB without an account, 25 MB when signed in), which typically covers hundreds of thousands of rows.

xlsx-to-pdf.title: XLSX → PDF
xlsx-to-pdf.heading: XLSX → PDF
xlsx-to-pdf.description: Export selected sheets to printable PDF files.
xlsx-to-pdf.seoHowItWorks2: Select the sheets you want to include and choose page orientation.
xlsx-to-pdf.seoHowItWorks3: Click Download to get your formatted PDF instantly.
xlsx-to-pdf.seoWhyUse: Need to share spreadsheet data with people who don't have Excel? PDF is the universal document format. Convert your Excel files to clean, printable PDFs — perfect for reports, invoices, and data sharing.
xlsx-to-pdf.seoFaq1A: The PDF contains the computed cell values in a formatted table layout. Excel formulas, conditional formatting, and charts are not included.
xlsx-to-pdf.seoFaq2Q: Can I choose which sheets to export?
xlsx-to-pdf.seoFaq2A: Yes. After uploading, select one or more sheets to include in the PDF output.
xlsx-to-pdf.seoFaq3A: The PDF is generated in A4 size. You can choose between landscape and portrait orientation.

pdf-to-xlsx.title: PDF → XLSX
pdf-to-xlsx.heading: PDF → XLSX
pdf-to-xlsx.description: Extract tables from PDF documents into Excel-ready spreadsheets.

xlsx-to-json.title: XLSX → JSON
xlsx-to-json.heading: XLSX → JSON
xlsx-to-json.description: Export sheet data to JSON for APIs and workflows.
xlsx-to-json.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and select the sheets to export.
xlsx-to-json.seoHowItWorks2: The first row is used as JSON keys; each subsequent row becomes an object.
xlsx-to-json.seoHowItWorks3: Click Download JSON to get your structured data file.
xlsx-to-json.seoWhyUse: JSON is the standard format for web APIs and modern data pipelines. Convert spreadsheets to JSON for direct use in applications, scripts, or databases.
xlsx-to-json.seoFaq1A: An array of objects where each object represents a row, with column headers as keys.
xlsx-to-json.seoFaq2A: Nested objects and arrays in cells are serialized as JSON text strings.
xlsx-to-json.seoFaq3A: Yes. Select multiple sheets and they are included as separate arrays in the output.

json-to-xlsx.title: JSON → XLSX
json-to-xlsx.heading: JSON → XLSX
json-to-xlsx.description: Create XLSX workbooks from JSON arrays or objects.
json-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks1: Upload a JSON file containing an array of objects, array of arrays, or an object of arrays.
json-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks2: The tool auto-detects the structure and maps it to rows and columns.
json-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks3: Click Convert to download your XLSX workbook.
json-to-xlsx.seoWhyUse: Turn API responses, config files, or exported data into Excel spreadsheets for analysis, reporting, or sharing with non-technical stakeholders.
json-to-xlsx.seoFaq1A: Array of objects, array of arrays, and object of arrays (one sheet per key).
json-to-xlsx.seoFaq2A: Nested objects are serialized as JSON text in cells. Deep flattening is not applied.
json-to-xlsx.seoFaq3A: Yes. There is an option to include or exclude column headers in the output.

xlsx-to-sql.title: XLSX → SQL
xlsx-to-sql.heading: XLSX → SQL
xlsx-to-sql.description: Generate SQL CREATE and INSERT statements.
xlsx-to-sql.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and select the sheets to export.
xlsx-to-sql.seoHowItWorks2: The tool infers column types and generates CREATE TABLE statements.
xlsx-to-sql.seoHowItWorks3: Download a .sql file with CREATE and INSERT statements for every row.
xlsx-to-sql.seoWhyUse: Quickly seed a database from spreadsheet data. Generate ready-to-run SQL scripts for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, or any SQL-compatible database.
xlsx-to-sql.seoFaq1A: The tool detects BOOLEAN, INTEGER, REAL, DATE, and TEXT based on cell values.
xlsx-to-sql.seoFaq2Q: Can I add a table name prefix?
xlsx-to-sql.seoFaq2A: Yes. You can set an optional prefix that is prepended to each table name.
xlsx-to-sql.seoFaq3A: The generated SQL uses standard syntax compatible with MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and most SQL databases.

sql-to-xlsx.title: SQL → XLSX
sql-to-xlsx.heading: SQL → XLSX
sql-to-xlsx.description: Parse INSERT statements from a SQL file into an XLSX workbook.
sql-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks1: Upload a .sql file containing INSERT INTO statements.
sql-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks2: The tool extracts table names, columns, and row data automatically.
sql-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks3: Download an XLSX workbook with one sheet per table.
sql-to-xlsx.seoWhyUse: Visualize SQL dump data in Excel for quick review, auditing, or sharing with team members who don't have database access.
sql-to-xlsx.seoFaq1A: Only INSERT INTO statements are parsed. CREATE TABLE, SELECT, and other statements are ignored.
sql-to-xlsx.seoFaq2A: Yes. Each table found in the SQL file becomes a separate sheet in the output workbook.
sql-to-xlsx.seoFaq3Q: What if my SQL file has no INSERT statements?
sql-to-xlsx.seoFaq3A: The tool will produce an empty workbook. Ensure your file contains valid INSERT statements.

xlsx-to-xml.title: XLSX → XML
xlsx-to-xml.heading: XLSX → XML
xlsx-to-xml.description: Transform sheet rows into XML documents.
xlsx-to-xml.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and select the sheets to export.
xlsx-to-xml.seoHowItWorks2: Set the root element tag and row element tag names.
xlsx-to-xml.seoHowItWorks3: Download an XML file where each row becomes an XML element.
xlsx-to-xml.seoWhyUse: Generate XML feeds, configuration files, or data interchange documents directly from spreadsheet data without writing code.
xlsx-to-xml.seoFaq1Q: Can I customize the XML tag names?
xlsx-to-xml.seoFaq1A: Yes. You can set both the root element and row element tag names.
xlsx-to-xml.seoFaq2A: The first row is used as element names. Each data row becomes a child element of the root.
xlsx-to-xml.seoFaq3A: Yes. The tool generates well-formed XML with proper encoding declarations.

xml-to-xlsx.title: XML → XLSX
xml-to-xlsx.heading: XML → XLSX
xml-to-xlsx.description: Import XML feeds and map nodes to rows and columns.
xml-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks1: Upload an XML file with a tabular or repeating-element structure.
xml-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks2: The tool auto-detects row elements and maps sub-elements to columns.
xml-to-xlsx.seoHowItWorks3: Download an XLSX workbook with your XML data in spreadsheet format.
xml-to-xlsx.seoWhyUse: Convert XML feeds, API responses, or configuration exports into Excel for filtering, sorting, and analysis without manual data entry.
xml-to-xlsx.seoFaq1A: Tabular XML with repeating child elements works best. Deeply nested XML may not convert as expected.
xml-to-xlsx.seoFaq2A: Element text content is mapped to cells. Attributes on elements are included where detected.
xml-to-xlsx.seoFaq3Q: Can I get multiple sheets from one XML file?
xml-to-xlsx.seoFaq3A: Yes. Grouped elements or named sections become separate sheets automatically.

remove-empty-rows.title: Remove Empty Rows
remove-empty-rows.heading: Remove Empty Rows
remove-empty-rows.description: Remove rows that are completely empty across all columns.
remove-empty-rows.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to remove empty rows
remove-empty-rows.seoHowItWorks2: Select which sheets to clean or apply to all sheets.
remove-empty-rows.seoHowItWorks3: Download the cleaned file with all empty rows removed.
remove-empty-rows.seoWhyUse: Empty rows break sorting, filtering, and pivot tables. Remove them in seconds instead of scrolling through thousands of rows manually.
remove-empty-rows.seoFaq1Q: What counts as an empty row?
remove-empty-rows.seoFaq1A: A row where every cell is blank or contains only whitespace.
remove-empty-rows.seoFaq2Q: Can I choose which sheets to clean?
remove-empty-rows.seoFaq2A: Yes. Select specific sheets or apply to all sheets at once.
remove-empty-rows.seoFaq3Q: Does it remove the header row?
remove-empty-rows.seoFaq3A: No. The first row (header) is always preserved.

remove-duplicates.title: Remove Duplicates
remove-duplicates.heading: Remove Duplicates
remove-duplicates.description: Find and remove duplicate rows based on selected columns.
remove-duplicates.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and select the sheet to clean.
remove-duplicates.seoHowItWorks2: Choose which columns define a duplicate row using the column picker.
remove-duplicates.seoHowItWorks3: Review the duplicate count, choose to keep first or last occurrence, and download the cleaned file.
remove-duplicates.seoWhyUse: Clean up messy data exports, mailing lists, or imported datasets by removing exact or partial duplicates based on the columns that matter.
remove-duplicates.seoFaq1Q: Can I choose which columns to check for duplicates?
remove-duplicates.seoFaq1A: Yes. You select exactly which columns define a duplicate — it doesn't have to be all columns.
remove-duplicates.seoFaq2Q: Can I keep the last occurrence instead of the first?
remove-duplicates.seoFaq2A: Yes. You can choose to keep either the first or last occurrence of each duplicate group.
remove-duplicates.seoFaq3Q: Does it work on large files?
remove-duplicates.seoFaq3A: Yes. Files must stay within the per-file upload limit (10 MB without an account, 25 MB when signed in), which covers most typical spreadsheets.

trim-spaces.title: Trim Spaces
trim-spaces.heading: Trim Spaces
trim-spaces.description: Remove leading, trailing, and repeated spaces from text cells.
trim-spaces.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and choose to clean all sheets or a specific one.
trim-spaces.seoHowItWorks2: Optionally enable collapsing of repeated internal spaces.
trim-spaces.seoHowItWorks3: Download the cleaned workbook with all extra whitespace removed.
trim-spaces.seoWhyUse: Hidden spaces cause failed lookups, broken VLOOKUPs, and sorting issues. Trim them all in seconds instead of fixing cells one by one.
trim-spaces.seoFaq1Q: Does it remove spaces inside text too?
trim-spaces.seoFaq1A: By default it trims leading and trailing spaces. You can optionally collapse repeated internal spaces.
trim-spaces.seoFaq2Q: Can I clean only specific columns?
trim-spaces.seoFaq2A: Yes. You can select specific columns to clean or leave it on all columns.
trim-spaces.seoFaq3Q: Will it affect numbers or dates?
trim-spaces.seoFaq3A: No. Only text cells are trimmed. Numbers and dates remain unchanged.

normalize-case.title: Normalize Case
normalize-case.heading: Normalize Case
normalize-case.description: Normalize text to upper, lower, or title case.
normalize-case.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and choose the target case (upper, lower, or title).
normalize-case.seoHowItWorks2: Select which sheets and columns to normalize.
normalize-case.seoHowItWorks3: Download the workbook with all selected text converted to your chosen case.
normalize-case.seoWhyUse: Standardize inconsistent text casing in names, addresses, product titles, or any column where uniform formatting matters for reports or data matching.
normalize-case.seoFaq2Q: Can I apply different cases to different columns?
normalize-case.seoFaq2A: Currently one case is applied per operation. Run the tool again for a different case on other columns.
normalize-case.seoFaq3A: No. Only text cells are modified. Numbers, dates, and formulas are left unchanged.

find-replace.title: Find & Replace
find-replace.heading: Find & Replace
find-replace.description: Bulk find and replace text or regex patterns across sheets.
find-replace.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and enter the text or regex pattern to find.
find-replace.seoHowItWorks2: Enter the replacement text and choose scope (all sheets or specific columns).
find-replace.seoHowItWorks3: Download the updated workbook with all matches replaced.
find-replace.seoWhyUse: Bulk-edit spreadsheet data without opening Excel. Fix typos, update codes, standardize values, or apply regex transformations across thousands of cells instantly.
find-replace.seoFaq1A: Yes. Toggle the regex option to use full regular expression patterns for advanced matching.
find-replace.seoFaq2A: By default no, but you can enable case-sensitive matching with the toggle.
find-replace.seoFaq3Q: Can I replace across all sheets at once?
find-replace.seoFaq3A: Yes. You can apply the replacement to all sheets or limit it to specific ones.

scan-formula-errors.title: Scan Formula Errors
scan-formula-errors.heading: Scan Formula Errors
scan-formula-errors.description: Detect formula errors like #REF!, #VALUE!, and #DIV/0! across all sheets.
scan-formula-errors.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to scan for formula errors
scan-formula-errors.scanFailed: Could not scan for formula errors
scan-formula-errors.noErrorsFound: No formula errors found in this workbook.
scan-formula-errors.seoHowItWorks2: The tool scans every cell across all sheets for formula errors (#REF!, #VALUE!, #DIV/0!, #N/A, #NAME?, #NULL!, #NUM!).
scan-formula-errors.seoHowItWorks3: Review the error summary and download a detailed XLSX report with error locations and formulas.
scan-formula-errors.seoWhyUse: Auditors and analysts need to quickly identify broken formulas in complex workbooks. This tool scans every cell in seconds and produces a structured report — no manual cell-by-cell checking required.
scan-formula-errors.seoFaq1Q: What formula errors does it detect?
scan-formula-errors.seoFaq1A: It detects all standard Excel formula errors: #REF!, #VALUE!, #DIV/0!, #N/A, #NAME?, #NULL!, and #NUM!.
scan-formula-errors.seoFaq2A: No. This tool only identifies and reports errors. It does not modify your original file.
scan-formula-errors.seoFaq3A: A Summary tab with error counts by type and affected sheets, plus a Detail tab with every error's sheet name, cell reference, error type, and formula.

compare-workbooks.title: Compare Workbooks
compare-workbooks.heading: Compare Workbooks
compare-workbooks.description: Compare two Excel files cell by cell and download a diff report.
compare-workbooks.dropOriginal: Drop or select the original Excel file
compare-workbooks.dropModified: Drop or select the modified Excel file
compare-workbooks.seoHowItWorks1: Upload two Excel files — the original and the modified version.
compare-workbooks.seoHowItWorks2: The tool compares them sheet by sheet and cell by cell, detecting additions, removals, and modifications.
compare-workbooks.seoHowItWorks3: Download an XLSX diff report with a summary tab and per-sheet change details.
compare-workbooks.seoWhyUse: Track changes between workbook versions without relying on Excel's built-in tracking. Perfect for auditing spreadsheet updates, reviewing model changes, or verifying data migrations.
compare-workbooks.seoFaq1Q: What types of changes does it detect?
compare-workbooks.seoFaq1A: Added cells, removed cells, modified values, and modified formulas. It also detects sheets that were added or removed.
compare-workbooks.seoFaq2Q: Does it compare formulas or just values?
compare-workbooks.seoFaq2A: Both. The report includes original and new values as well as original and new formulas for each changed cell.
compare-workbooks.seoFaq3Q: What if a sheet exists in one file but not the other?
compare-workbooks.seoFaq3A: It is noted in the summary as an added or removed sheet.

summary-stats.title: Summary Stats
summary-stats.heading: Summary Stats
summary-stats.description: Get count, mean, median, sum, and more for every numeric column.
summary-stats.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to analyze
summary-stats.seoHowItWorks2: The tool analyzes every numeric column across all sheets.
summary-stats.seoHowItWorks3: Download a formatted XLSX report with one tab per sheet.
summary-stats.seoWhyUse: Get instant statistical insights from your spreadsheet data without writing formulas. Perfect for quick data audits and reporting.
summary-stats.seoFaq1A: Count, min, max, mean, median, standard deviation, sum, and blank count for each numeric column.
summary-stats.seoFaq2A: Only numeric columns are analyzed. Text and date columns are skipped.
summary-stats.seoFaq3Q: What does the report look like?
summary-stats.seoFaq3A: A professionally formatted XLSX with one tab per sheet, dark headers, and alternating row colors.

freeze-header.title: Freeze Header Row
freeze-header.heading: Freeze Header Row
freeze-header.description: Freeze header rows so they stay visible when scrolling.
freeze-header.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to freeze headers
freeze-header.seoHowItWorks2: Set how many rows to freeze (default is 1 for the header row).
freeze-header.seoHowItWorks3: Download the file with frozen panes applied to all sheets.
freeze-header.seoWhyUse: Keep your column headers visible while scrolling through large datasets. No need to open Excel — just upload, freeze, and download.
freeze-header.seoFaq1A: Yes. The freeze is applied to every sheet in the workbook.
freeze-header.seoFaq2Q: Can I freeze more than one row?
freeze-header.seoFaq2A: Yes. Set the number of rows to freeze (e.g., 2 for a two-row header).
freeze-header.seoFaq3A: No. Only the freeze pane setting is changed. Your data remains untouched.

auto-size-columns.title: Auto Size Columns
auto-size-columns.heading: Auto Size Columns
auto-size-columns.description: Auto-fit column widths to match cell content across all sheets.
auto-size-columns.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to auto-size columns
auto-size-columns.seoHowItWorks2: The tool scans every cell and adjusts column widths to fit content.
auto-size-columns.seoHowItWorks3: Download the file with all columns properly sized.
auto-size-columns.seoWhyUse: Stop manually dragging column borders. Auto-fit all columns in seconds for clean, readable spreadsheets ready to share or print.
auto-size-columns.seoFaq1Q: Does it work on all sheets?
auto-size-columns.seoFaq1A: Yes. Every sheet in the workbook gets auto-sized columns.
auto-size-columns.seoFaq2Q: Is there a maximum column width?
auto-size-columns.seoFaq2A: Yes. Columns are capped at 60 characters width to prevent extremely wide columns.
auto-size-columns.seoFaq3A: No. Only column widths are adjusted. Cell values and formatting are preserved.

format-dates.title: Format Dates
format-dates.heading: Format Dates
format-dates.description: Detect and normalize date/time formats across columns.

sort-rows.title: Sort Rows
sort-rows.heading: Sort Rows
sort-rows.description: Sort rows by one or more columns in ascending or descending order.
sort-rows.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to sort rows
sort-rows.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and select the sheet to sort.
sort-rows.seoHowItWorks2: Choose up to 3 columns and sort direction for each.
sort-rows.seoWhyUse: Sort your spreadsheet data by any column without opening Excel. Supports multi-column sorting for complex ordering needs.
sort-rows.seoFaq1Q: Can I sort by multiple columns?
sort-rows.seoFaq1A: Yes. You can add up to 3 sort keys with independent ascending/descending direction.
sort-rows.seoFaq2Q: Does it preserve the header row?
sort-rows.seoFaq2A: Yes. The header row stays in place and only data rows are sorted.
sort-rows.seoFaq3A: Empty cells are sorted to the end regardless of sort direction.

transpose-sheet.title: Transpose Sheet
transpose-sheet.heading: Transpose Sheet
transpose-sheet.description: Flip rows and columns — transpose any sheet instantly.
transpose-sheet.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to transpose
transpose-sheet.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and select the sheet to transpose.
transpose-sheet.seoHowItWorks2: The tool swaps rows and columns instantly.
transpose-sheet.seoWhyUse: Quickly flip your data orientation when you need rows as columns or vice versa. Perfect for reformatting data for different reporting needs.
transpose-sheet.seoFaq1A: You select which sheet to transpose. Other sheets remain unchanged.
transpose-sheet.seoFaq2A: Merged cells are unmerged during transposition. Data values are preserved.
transpose-sheet.seoFaq3A: The same per-file upload limits apply (10 MB without an account, 25 MB when signed in), which covers most typical spreadsheets.

split-column.title: Split Column
split-column.heading: Split Column
split-column.description: Split one column into many by comma, space, dash, or custom delimiter.
split-column.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to split a column
split-column.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and select the sheet and column to split.
split-column.seoHowItWorks2: Choose a delimiter (comma, space, dash, or custom) and whether to keep the original column.
split-column.seoHowItWorks3: Download the file with the column split into multiple columns.
split-column.seoWhyUse: Split combined data like "first, last" names or "city-state" into separate columns for easier filtering, sorting, and analysis.
split-column.seoFaq1A: Comma, space, dash, semicolon, pipe, tab, and any custom string.
split-column.seoFaq2Q: Can I keep the original column?
split-column.seoFaq2A: Yes. Toggle the option to keep or remove the original column after splitting.
split-column.seoFaq3Q: What if cells have different numbers of parts?
split-column.seoFaq3A: The tool creates enough columns for the maximum number of parts. Shorter cells get empty values in extra columns.

validate-emails.title: Validate Emails
validate-emails.heading: Validate Emails
validate-emails.description: Validate email formats and get a color-coded status report.
validate-emails.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to validate emails
validate-emails.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and select the sheet and column containing emails.
validate-emails.seoHowItWorks2: The tool validates each email address format using regex pattern matching.
validate-emails.seoHowItWorks3: Download a color-coded report showing Valid (green), Invalid (red), and Empty (gray) status.
validate-emails.seoWhyUse: Clean your mailing lists and contact databases by identifying invalid email formats before sending campaigns or importing into CRM systems.
validate-emails.seoFaq1Q: Does it check if emails actually exist?
validate-emails.seoFaq1A: No. It validates the format only (regex validation). It does not send verification emails or check DNS records.
validate-emails.seoFaq2Q: What counts as a valid email?
validate-emails.seoFaq2A: Standard email format: user@domain.tld with valid characters and at least a 2-letter domain extension.
validate-emails.seoFaq3A: Your original data with an added Email Status column, color-coded green (Valid), red (Invalid), or gray (Empty).

detect-blanks.title: Detect Blanks
detect-blanks.heading: Detect Blanks
detect-blanks.description: Find blank cells across all sheets and download a detailed report.
detect-blanks.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to detect blank cells
detect-blanks.noBlanksFound: No blank cells found in this workbook.
detect-blanks.seoHowItWorks2: The tool scans every cell across all sheets for blanks.
detect-blanks.seoHowItWorks3: Download a report with a Summary tab and a Detail tab listing every blank cell.
detect-blanks.seoWhyUse: Find missing data in your spreadsheets before importing into databases or submitting reports. Identify which sheets and columns have the most gaps.
detect-blanks.seoFaq1Q: What counts as a blank cell?
detect-blanks.seoFaq1A: Cells that are empty (null) or contain only whitespace characters.
detect-blanks.seoFaq2A: Yes. Every sheet in the workbook is scanned automatically.
detect-blanks.seoFaq3A: A Summary tab with blank counts and percentages per sheet, and a Detail tab with the exact cell reference for each blank.

password-protect.title: Password Protect
password-protect.heading: Password Protect
password-protect.description: Lock sheets with a password to prevent accidental edits.
password-protect.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to protect
password-protect.limitation: This protects sheets from editing (structure, content, formatting). It does not set a file-open password — the file can still be opened and viewed by anyone.
password-protect.seoHowItWorks1: Upload your Excel file and enter a protection password.
password-protect.seoHowItWorks2: Select which sheets to protect and what to protect (structure, content, formatting).
password-protect.seoWhyUse: Prevent accidental edits to your spreadsheets before sharing. Protect formulas, formatting, and sheet structure with a password.
password-protect.seoFaq1Q: Does this prevent opening the file?
password-protect.seoFaq1A: No. This protects sheets from editing. Anyone can still open and view the file without a password.
password-protect.seoFaq2Q: Can I protect only some sheets?
password-protect.seoFaq2A: Yes. Select which sheets to protect or apply protection to all sheets.
password-protect.seoFaq3A: Sheet protection deters casual editing but is not encryption. It should not be used for sensitive data security.

remove-password.title: Remove Password
remove-password.heading: Remove Password
remove-password.description: Remove sheet editing protection without the original password.
remove-password.dropMessage: Drop or select an Excel file to remove protection
remove-password.limitation: This removes sheet editing protection only. It cannot unlock files that require a password to open.
remove-password.seoHowItWorks2: The tool removes sheet-level protection from all sheets.
remove-password.seoWhyUse: Unlock sheet protection when you need to edit a protected spreadsheet. Works instantly without needing the original password.
remove-password.seoFaq1A: No. This tool only removes sheet-level protection. Files encrypted with an open password cannot be unlocked.
remove-password.seoFaq2Q: Do I need the original password?
remove-password.seoFaq2A: No. Sheet-level protection can be removed without the original password.
remove-password.seoFaq3A: No. Only the protection settings are removed. All data and formatting remain unchanged.

about.metaDescription: Learn about XLSX World's mission to make spreadsheet tools free, fast, and private for everyone.
about.heading: About XLSX World
about.tagline: We believe working with spreadsheets should be instant, accessible, and private. No installs, no bloat — just tools that work.
about.visionText: A world where anyone can transform, clean, and analyze spreadsheet data in seconds — without expensive software, technical expertise, or giving up their privacy.
about.missionText: To build the most accessible suite of Excel tools on the web. Every core tool works without signup, runs in your browser, and never stores your files. We ship fast, listen to users, and keep things simple.

speed.title: Speed First
speed.text: Upload, process, download. No waiting, no queues, no friction. Your time matters.

privacy.title: Privacy by Design
privacy.text: Your files are yours. Uploads are never kept. Outputs are encrypted end-to-end and auto-deleted after 7 days. We never read your data and never sell anything to anyone.

simplicity.title: Radical Simplicity
simplicity.text: One tool, one job, done well. No bloated interfaces, no learning curves. Just drop your file and go.

about.storyText: XLSX World started from a simple frustration: why do you need to install heavy software or pay a subscription just to convert a spreadsheet? We built the tools we wished existed — fast, accessible, and respectful of your data. Today, thousands of people use XLSX World every month. A generous free tier keeps the tools available to everyone, and optional paid plans help us keep the lights on and ship new features faster.
